name: pcs-jira-task-builder
description: Beta. Reads pcs-promo-parser Stage 1 CSVs (from the Promo Parsed Output/ folder) and creates corresponding Jira Tasks in the PCS Promotions space. Hard PROM write-protection: always prompts for target project, requires literal-phrase confirmation to write to production. Defaults to PAT (test). Handles kit promos, NLPs, RSAs with manual review, per-vendor period naming (Milwaukee/DeWalt/Makita/Bosch/GearWrench P<N> = the deck quarter number, EGO H1-H2, Flex Q1-Q4), storefront link scaffolding, and PROM-style description templates. v0.4.0: Jira Task titles corrected to PROM convention -- the period token is now P<N> = the deck's quarter number (Q3 deck -> 2026 P3, not a half-year P2; EGO stays H1/H2, Flex stays Q1-Q4); the deck's promo identifier is now KEPT at the END of the title, bracketed ([PCR: P-00208522] / [PCE: 262776]), omitted on no-ID pages and on consolidated multi-ID tasks; titles are generalized to short title-cased phrases with no vendor-name prefix, no SKUs, and no ALL-CAPS / BUY (n)...GET (n) deck boilerplate; an online-only gate skips any Other-Promotions group that is not online-executable (Online Execution No with no online window -- in-store / spend-threshold / volume, e.g. DeWalt PMAPP = IN-STORE ONLY) so it never becomes a Task (RSA stays the deliberate tracked exception); and field mapping now states plainly that PAT is a sandbox whose field set, option labels, and option IDs do NOT match PROM (PAT POS/Online options are labeled 'Option 1', Promo Deck URL is absent on PAT) -- discover fields/options at runtime and skip-and-flag what is missing. v0.3.0: Promo Type is set by a shared rule (free goods -> Manufacturer Free Goods; NLP/special-buy -> Manufacturer NLP; coupon/BMSM/buy-X-get-Y -> Manufacturer Coupon; e-rebate -> E-rebate; self-funding left for a coworker; Buy-In is Think-Tank-only and never auto-defaulted). Online Execution = Yes when the promo has online dates; due date = last takedown; Needs POS Redemption = Yes for RSA/credit OR when the deck page shows credit/redemption clues (any vendor). All non-RSA NLPs for a vendor/quarter consolidate into one Task with a sub-task per date group, each carrying a start-pricing CSV + a revert-schedule CSV (revert prices from NetSuite later). The deck-page screenshot is attached per task, the Promo Deck URL field is set from a Google Drive hub search, and the Jira attachment token is read from a project-folder text file (never chat). Auto-HERO marking is removed (no Priority bump, no (HERO) suffix), and labels are Vendor + Quarter-Year (e.g. Q3-2026) + promo-type label(s) (Kit-Promo / NLP / Coupon / E-Rebate; BMSM added alongside Coupon; RSA added for RSA promos). The WRITE TO PROM gate is unchanged. v0.2.0: also creates Tasks from the parser's new Other-Promotions.csv (Buy-More-Save-More / e-rebate / promo-code) with per-group review, BMSM/E-Rebate/Coupon labels, and the coupon-code title format; e-rebate/BMSM/promo-code are no longer Non-Included reasons; tolerates absent (empty) parser files using the always-present Parser-Audit manifest.
